arts.ttl: Sacchi: “Atalanta Still in Scudetto Race, Conte Can Win Without Kvara Like I Did Without Van Basten”
arts.sum: Former coaching legend Arrigo Sacchi shared his thoughts on the tight Serie A title race with Gazzetta dello Sport, emphasizing that Atalanta should not be counted out despite trailing the leaders. With just one point separating Napoli and Inter Milan at the top of the table, Sacchi offered his insights on the thrilling battle for the Scudetto. The post Sacchi: “Atalanta Still in Scudetto Race, Conte Can Win Without Kvara Like I Did Without Van Basten” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
